commands.purpose: Approve one explicit asset snapshot for a workspace.
List the explicit attachment record for a workspace.
Resolve one task file against approved workspace attachments.
Approve an explicit replacement for one workspace attachment.
Restore the preceding snapshot for one workspace attachment.
Remove only one workspace attachment relation.
Inspect an explicit local KDNA asset or source directory.
Validate an explicit local KDNA asset or source directory.
Return the Core LoadPlan for an explicit packaged asset.
Load an explicit packaged asset only when Core authorizes it.
Pack an explicit KDNA source directory.
Unpack an explicit packaged KDNA asset into an empty directory.
Create one of the two maintained local source fixtures.
